de.uka.ilkd.key.settings

Class ViewSettings

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.ViewSettings
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Settings, Cloneable

    public class ViewSettings
extends Object
implements Settings, Cloneable
    This class encapsulates information about: 1) relative font size in the prover view 2) the maximal number of lines a tooltip with instantiated SchemaVariables is allowed to have. If this number is exceeded no SchemaVariables get instantiated in the displayed tooltip. 3) wether intermediate proofsteps should be hidden in the proof tree view

        public boolean getNotifyLoadBehaviour()
        When loading a Java file, all other java files in the parent directory are loaded as well. Should there be a notification about this when opening a file?

      • readSettings

        public void readSettings(Object sender,
                Properties props)
        gets a Properties object and has to perform the necessary steps in order to change this object in a way that it represents the stored settings
        Specified by:
        readSettings in interface Settings
        Parameters:
        props - the collection of properties

      • writeSettings

        public void writeSettings(Object sender,
                 Properties props)
        implements the method required by the Settings interface. The settings are written to the given Properties object. Only entries of the form =(, )* are allowed.
        Specified by:
        writeSettings in interface Settings
        Parameters:
        props - the Properties object where to write the settings as (key, value) pair

      • fireSettingsChanged

        protected void fireSettingsChanged()
        sends the message that the state of this setting has been changed to its registered listeners (not thread-safe)

      • isUseUnicode

        public boolean isUseUnicode()
        Use Unicode Symbols is only allowed if pretty syntax is used
        Returns:
        setting of use unicode symbols (if use pretty syntax is on, return the value which is set, if use retty is false, return false)
